Sign In Get API Key

The Product Catalog API for AI Agents

BuyWhere gives AI agents a structured REST surface for searching, comparing, and retrieving product data from Singapore's top e-commerce platforms.

Get Started View API Reference
API Response 

            

        

    






    

        
Built for Agent Commerce

        

            

                

                    
                

                
Natural Language Search

                
Query products using natural language. Our semantic search understands what your agents are looking for.

            

            

                

                    
                

                
Multi-Platform Coverage

                
Amazon, Walmart, Target, Best Buy, and more. One API to rule them all.

            

            

                

                    
                

                
Normalized Data

                
Consistent schema across all platforms. No more dealing with retailer-specific formats.

            

            

                

                    
                

                
MCP Native

                
First-class Model Context Protocol support. Connect directly to Claude, Cursor, and other AI agents.

            

        

    






    

        
SEA Retailer Coverage

        
Real-time product data from Singapore and Southeast Asia's top e-commerce platforms

        

            

                

                    
                    Shopee
                

                

                    200K+
                    Products
                

            

            

                

                    
                    Lazada
                

                

                    150K+
                    Products
                

            

            

                

                    
                    FairPrice
                

                

                    80K+
                    Products
                

            

            

                

                    
                    Carousell
                

                

                    50K+
                    Products
                

                

                    50K+
                    Products

Why Not Scraping?

        
Traditional web scraping is fragile and high-maintenance. BuyWhere provides a structured alternative.

        

            

                
Scraping

                
    
                    
  • 
                        
                        Fragile — breaks when sites change layouts
                    
    • 
                    
  • 
                        
                        Unstructured data — every retailer is different
                    
    • 
                    
  • 
                        
                        High maintenance — constant breakage monitoring
                    
    • 
                    
  • 
                        
                        Rate limited or blocked by retailers
                    
    • 
                    
  • 
                        
                        No semantic understanding of products
                    
    • 
                

            

            

                
BuyWhere

                
    
                    
  • 
                        
                        Stable — normalized API, no layout dependency
                    
    • 
                    
  • 
                        
                        Structured — consistent schema across all retailers
                    
    • 
                    
  • 
                        
                        Low maintenance — we handle the data plumbing
                    
    • 
                    
  • 
                        
                        Reliable — enterprise SLA and dedicated infrastructure
                    
    • 
                    
  • 
                        
                        Semantic — natural language and structured search
                    
    • 
                

            

        

    






    

        
Start Building Today

        
Get your API key and make your first query in under 60 seconds.

        

            Get API Key
            Read the Docs
        

    




    


    

        

            

                

                    
                        
                        BuyWhere
